what_it_does: Records an image attachment entry in the design-assets channel, mapping an attachment id to an image target URI and an addition timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
standouts: The target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Users6.
It is a ledger-style attachment record for a design channel.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Id prefix att- for attachment records.
Channel-memory ledger format with channel and attachment_type fields.
concerns: The image:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone.
No dimensions, MIME type, or author information is recorded.
notes: This is a ledger entry that links attachment att-008a9fb4 to the Users6 icon image in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the Users6 icon represent?
How is the image://design-assets/icons/Users6 target resolved or stored?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is an images attachment record, and the file does exactly that by storing attachment metadata; it matches.
intention_signals: To create a stable, timestamped record that an image asset was attached to the design-assets channel and to map the attachment id to the actual image target.
contribution: A stable attachment record that maps an identifier to a design-assets image target and records when it was added, supporting asset lookup and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-008a9fb4 in the design-assets channel references the image target image://design-assets/icons/Users6 and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Track the attachment of the Users6 icon image to the design-assets channel.
